rbc.name: RBC Royal Bank
rbc.tagline: Canada's largest bank, powering homeownership coast to coast.
rbc.overview: RBC Royal Bank is Canada's largest bank and a dominant force in the residential mortgage market. Known for stability, competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates, and a vast branch network, RBC serves millions of Canadian homeowners. Their mortgage offerings include fixed-rate mortgages, variable-rate mortgages, and the RBC Homeline Plan — a flexible home equity line of credit that lets you borrow up to 65% of your home's value. RBC offers online mortgage pre-approval with rate holds up to 120 days, making it easy to shop with confidence. Whether you're a first-time homebuyer navigating the stress test or a seasoned investor, RBC's mortgage advisors provide tailored guidance across Canada.
uniqueFeatures: RBC Homeline Plan for equity access

td.name: TD Bank
td.tagline: Comfortable banking with flexible mortgage solutions.
td.overview: TD Bank is one of Canada's most recognized financial institutions, offering a full suite of mortgage products designed for every stage of homeownership. TD is well-known for its TD Mortgage Affordability Calculator and flexible prepayment options that let borrowers increase payments by up to 100% or make annual lump-sum prepayments up to 15%. TD offers both fixed and variable mortgage rates, including the popular TD Home Equity FlexLine that combines a mortgage with a revolving line of credit. With thousands of branches, robust online banking, and dedicated mortgage specialists, TD makes the home buying and refinancing process straightforward for Canadian families.

scotiabank.name: Scotiabank
scotiabank.tagline: Unlock your home's potential with the Scotia Total Equity Plan.
scotiabank.overview: Scotiabank stands out in the Canadian mortgage market with its innovative Scotia Total Equity Plan (STEP), allowing homeowners to combine a mortgage with a home equity line of credit and access up to 80% of their home's value. Scotiabank offers competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates, plus specialized products for newcomers, self-employed borrowers, and investors. Their eHOME platform enables a fully digital mortgage application experience, while Home Financing Advisors provide personalized support in-branch or virtually. Scotia Mortgage Protection offers optional insurance coverage for life, disability, critical illness, and job loss — giving homeowners peace of mind.
uniqueFeatures: STEP: access up to 80% home equity

bmo.name: BMO Bank of Montreal
bmo.tagline: Making homeownership possible with smart mortgage solutions.
bmo.overview: BMO Bank of Montreal is one of Canada's oldest and most trusted banks, offering a comprehensive range of mortgage products for first-time buyers, renewals, and refinances. BMO is known for its Smart Fixed Mortgage, which provides peace of mind with a fixed rate and flexible prepayment options. BMO also offers a full-featured Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) for homeowners looking to tap into their property's equity. With competitive rates, a user-friendly online mortgage calculator, and access to mortgage specialists across Canada, BMO helps borrowers navigate the mortgage stress test and find the right financing solution.
uniqueFeatures: Smart Fixed Mortgage with prepayment flexibility

cibc.name: CIBC
cibc.tagline: Ambition meets innovation with the CIBC Home Power Plan.
cibc.overview: CIBC is a leading Canadian bank offering competitive mortgage rates and the innovative CIBC Home Power Plan, which combines a mortgage with a home equity line of credit to give borrowers flexible access to funds at low interest rates. CIBC provides fixed-rate, variable-rate, and convertible mortgages, along with specialized products for newcomers to Canada and investment properties. Their online mortgage tools, including payment calculators and pre-approval, make it easy to explore options from anywhere. CIBC mortgage advisors offer personalized advice with no cost or obligation, helping clients understand prepayment options and mortgage renewal strategies.
uniqueFeatures: Home Power Plan: mortgage + HELOC combo

nationalbank.name: National Bank of Canada
nationalbank.tagline: Tailored mortgage solutions for Quebec and beyond.
nationalbank.overview: National Bank of Canada is the sixth-largest bank in Canada and a major player in Quebec's mortgage market, with a growing presence nationwide. National Bank offers a full range of mortgage products including fixed-rate, variable-rate, and all-in-one banking solutions that combine mortgage and line of credit features. Their Flex Mortgage allows borrowers to split their mortgage between fixed and variable rates for balanced risk. With competitive rates, a strong digital platform, and dedicated mortgage advisors, National Bank serves first-time buyers, renewals, refinances, and investors with tailored financing solutions.
uniqueFeatures: Flex Mortgage: split fixed and variable

nesto.name: nesto
nesto.tagline: Canada's digital mortgage lender with guaranteed low rates.
nesto.overview: nesto is Canada's pioneering online mortgage lender, using AI-powered algorithms to deliver the lowest mortgage rates upfront — with no commissions and no bias. Since launching, nesto has helped over 450,000 Canadians secure financing through a fully digital, streamlined experience. Their Low Mortgage Rate Guarantee ensures you get the best possible rate from day one, backed by a team of 300+ licensed mortgage experts. nesto offers fixed and variable mortgages, 150-day rate holds, and an end-to-end online application process that eliminates paperwork and branch visits. For tech-savvy homebuyers seeking transparency and speed, nesto is a top choice.

simplii.name: Simplii Financial
simplii.tagline: Simple, no-fee banking with competitive mortgage rates.
simplii.overview: Simplii Financial, a division of CIBC, delivers a straightforward digital banking experience with competitive mortgage rates and no monthly account fees. Simplii offers both fixed-rate and variable-rate mortgages with special discounted rates for high-ratio insured mortgages. Borrowers benefit from the ability to convert variable rates to fixed at any time and make annual prepayments up to 20% without penalty. With dedicated CIBC mortgage specialists handling applications, Simplii combines the personal touch of a major bank with the convenience of online-only banking. Their mortgage calculators and educational resources help first-time buyers understand affordability and payment options.

tangerine.name: Tangerine
tangerine.tagline: Forward-thinking mortgages from Canada's original digital bank.
tangerine.overview: Tangerine, a subsidiary of Scotiabank, is one of Canada's most trusted digital banks, offering competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates with no hidden fees. Tangerine mortgages come with flexible features including annual prepayment options and the ability to increase regular payments. Their fully online mortgage application process is simple and fast, supported by a dedicated team of mortgage account managers. Tangerine is particularly popular among rate-conscious borrowers who appreciate transparent pricing and the backing of Scotiabank's financial strength. With mortgage rate specials, renewal offers, and a suite of digital tools, Tangerine makes home financing accessible and hassle-free.

eqbank.name: EQ Bank
eqbank.tagline: High-interest savings meets modern mortgage solutions.
eqbank.overview: EQ Bank, a trade name of Equitable Bank, has rapidly become a favourite among Canadian savers and borrowers alike. Known for industry-leading savings account rates, EQ Bank also offers competitive mortgage products through its parent company, Equitable Bank — one of Canada's largest alternative lenders. EQ Bank's digital-first platform provides a seamless experience for mortgage pre-approval, rate comparison, and application. Their mortgages feature flexible terms, competitive fixed and variable rates, and no monthly banking fees. For borrowers seeking an alternative to the Big Six banks without sacrificing service, EQ Bank delivers a refreshing, tech-forward approach to Canadian mortgages.

wealthsimple.name: Wealthsimple
wealthsimple.tagline: Low rates, cash back, and a fully digital mortgage experience.
wealthsimple.overview: Wealthsimple has disrupted the Canadian mortgage market by offering a fully digital, commission-free mortgage experience with cash-back bonuses up to $3,000 for eligible clients. Wealthsimple searches across 25+ lending partners to find the best fixed and variable mortgage rates, then passes savings directly to borrowers. Their insured 5-year fixed rate and variable rate options are among the most competitive in Canada. The entire process — from rate quote to approval — happens online, with a dedicated broker guiding you through closing. Wealthsimple's tiered cash-back program rewards loyal clients: Core members get up to $500, Premium up to $1,500, and Generation up to $3,000.

alterna.name: Alterna Savings
alterna.tagline: Member-owned banking with community-focused mortgage solutions.
alterna.overview: Alterna Savings is one of Ontario's leading credit unions, offering member-owned banking with a strong focus on community and personalized service. Alterna provides a full range of mortgage products including fixed-rate, variable-rate, and home equity lines of credit, all with competitive rates and flexible terms. As a credit union, Alterna returns profits to members through better rates, lower fees, and community investment. Their mortgage specialists work closely with borrowers to find solutions tailored to individual needs, whether you're buying your first home, renewing, or refinancing. Alterna's digital banking platform makes managing your mortgage simple and convenient.

motive.name: Motive Financial
motive.tagline: Digital banking with high rates and straightforward mortgages.
motive.overview: Motive Financial, a division of Canadian Western Bank, is a digital-only bank offering competitive mortgage rates and high-interest savings products. Motive's mortgage lineup includes fixed-rate and variable-rate options with transparent terms and no hidden fees. Their online platform makes it easy to apply, track your application, and manage payments. Motive is particularly appealing to self-directed borrowers who value simplicity and competitive pricing over branch-based service. With the financial backing of Canadian Western Bank, Motive delivers a secure, modern alternative to traditional mortgage lending.

firstnational.name: First National Financial
firstnational.tagline: Canada's largest non-bank mortgage lender, exclusively through brokers.
firstnational.overview: First National Financial is Canada's largest non-bank mortgage lender, funding billions in residential mortgages annually exclusively through the mortgage broker channel. First National offers some of the most competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates in Canada, with flexible prepayment options and exceptional customer service. Their My Mortgage online portal lets borrowers manage payments, view statements, and access mortgage details 24/7. First National is also a leader in commercial mortgages and multi-unit residential financing. For borrowers working with a mortgage broker, First National consistently delivers low rates, fast approvals, and industry-leading technology.

mcap.name: MCAP
mcap.tagline: Canada's largest independent mortgage finance company.
mcap.overview: MCAP is Canada's largest independent Mortgage Finance Company, offering residential mortgage solutions through a vast network of mortgage brokers. MCAP provides competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates, flexible payment schedules, and a variety of terms to suit every borrower's goals. Their online mortgage calculator and property tax service simplify homeownership management. MCAP also offers specialized programs for self-employed borrowers, newcomers, and those with unique financing needs. With a reputation for competitive rates and responsive broker support, MCAP is a go-to lender for Canadians seeking alternatives to the big banks.

manulife.name: Manulife Bank
manulife.tagline: All-in-one banking that puts your mortgage to work.
manulife.overview: Manulife Bank offers the innovative Manulife One account, an all-in-one mortgage and banking solution that combines your mortgage, line of credit, and chequing into a single account. By depositing your income directly against your mortgage balance, you can dramatically reduce interest costs and pay off your home faster. Manulife also offers traditional fixed and variable mortgage products with competitive rates. Their digital platform makes it easy to manage your all-in-one account, track interest savings, and access funds when needed. For financially savvy homeowners looking to optimize their mortgage strategy, Manulife One is a unique and powerful tool.

laurentian.name: Laurentian Bank
laurentian.tagline: Bilingual service with flexible Quebec and Ontario mortgages.
laurentian.overview: Laurentian Bank is a Quebec-based financial institution with a strong presence in both Quebec and Ontario, offering bilingual mortgage services in English and French. Laurentian provides a comprehensive range of mortgage products including fixed-rate, variable-rate, and all-in-one solutions. Their mortgage specialists are known for personalized service and the ability to structure financing for complex situations, including self-employed borrowers and investment properties. Laurentian's digital tools and competitive rates make it a solid choice for homeowners in Eastern Canada looking for an alternative to the major banks.

merix.name: Merix Financial
merix.tagline: Innovative mortgage solutions for the modern Canadian borrower.
merix.overview: Merix Financial is a leading Canadian monoline lender offering a diverse range of mortgage products exclusively through mortgage brokers. Merix is known for competitive rates, flexible underwriting, and innovative programs for borrowers who don't fit the traditional bank mold. Their product lineup includes fixed-rate, variable-rate, and specialized mortgages for self-employed individuals, rental property investors, and those with non-traditional income. Merix's online broker portal, LYNX, streamlines the application process, while their customer service team provides responsive support throughout the mortgage lifecycle.

lendwise.name: Lendwise
lendwise.tagline: Smart lending solutions for today's Canadian homeowner.
lendwise.overview: Lendwise is a Canadian alternative mortgage lender specializing in residential mortgages for borrowers who may not qualify with traditional banks. Lendwise offers a range of products including first mortgages, second mortgages, and home equity loans with flexible qualification criteria. They focus on common-sense underwriting, looking beyond credit scores to understand each borrower's full financial picture. Lendwise is particularly popular for debt consolidation, home renovations, and financing for self-employed individuals. Their broker channel ensures borrowers receive personalized advice while accessing competitive alternative mortgage rates.

butlermortgage.name: Butler Mortgage
butlermortgage.overview: Butler Mortgage started as one of Ontario's most respected mortgage brokerages and has evolved to offer direct lending solutions alongside broker services. Butler provides competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates with a focus on transparent, honest advice. Their direct-to-consumer model, combined with deep broker expertise, gives borrowers the best of both worlds: low rates and expert guidance. Butler Mortgage is known for fast approvals, straightforward terms, and a commitment to helping Ontario homeowners find the right financing solution.

cmls.name: CMLS Financial
cmls.tagline: Commercial and residential mortgage expertise since 1974.
cmls.overview: CMLS Financial is one of Canada's oldest and most respected mortgage lenders, with over 50 years of experience in residential, commercial, and construction financing. CMLS offers competitive fixed and variable mortgage rates through the broker channel, backed by institutional-grade stability and service. Their residential mortgage products include conventional and high-ratio options, with flexible terms and prepayment privileges. CMLS is particularly strong in multi-unit residential and commercial lending, making them a preferred partner for investors and developers. Their long track record and conservative approach provide borrowers with confidence and reliability.

rfa.name: RFA (Robinson Financial Advisory)
rfa.tagline: Alternative mortgage solutions for non-traditional borrowers.
rfa.overview: RFA is a Canadian alternative mortgage lender specializing in residential mortgages for borrowers who need flexible solutions beyond what traditional banks offer. RFA provides first and second mortgages, home equity loans, and refinancing options with a focus on quick turnaround times and common-sense underwriting. They serve borrowers with bruised credit, self-employed income, or unique property types that may not fit bank guidelines. Through the broker channel, RFA offers personalized mortgage solutions with competitive alternative rates.

streetcapital.name: Street Capital Bank of Canada
streetcapital.tagline: A bank built for mortgage brokers and their clients.
streetcapital.overview: Street Capital Bank of Canada is a Schedule I bank dedicated exclusively to the mortgage broker channel, offering residential mortgage products with competitive rates and exceptional service. Street Capital provides fixed-rate, variable-rate, and high-ratio insured mortgages, along with flexible prepayment options. Their commitment to the broker community has made them a favourite among mortgage professionals who value fast response times, consistent underwriting, and reliable funding. Street Capital combines the stability of a federally regulated bank with the agility of a broker-focused lender.

centum.name: Centum Financial Group
centum.tagline: Canada's mortgage experts, powered by a national broker network.
centum.overview: Centum Financial Group is one of Canada's largest mortgage broker networks, connecting borrowers with competitive mortgage products from a wide range of lenders. While Centum itself is not a direct lender, their network of licensed mortgage professionals provides access to hundreds of mortgage options including bank, monoline, and alternative lenders. Centum brokers specialize in finding the best mortgage rates and terms for each client's unique situation, from first-time homebuyers to investors to those with credit challenges. Their national presence and deep lender relationships make Centum a powerful ally in navigating Canada's mortgage market.

intellimortgage.name: IntelliMortgage
intellimortgage.tagline: Rate comparison and mortgage intelligence in one place.
intellimortgage.overview: IntelliMortgage is a Canadian digital mortgage platform that combines advanced rate comparison technology with licensed broker expertise. The platform aggregates rates from major banks, credit unions, and monoline lenders, allowing borrowers to compare mortgage options side-by-side. IntelliMortgage's proprietary algorithms analyze rates, terms, and features to recommend the best mortgage for each client's goals. Their team of mortgage professionals provides personalized advice to complement the technology, ensuring borrowers get both speed and expertise. For Canadians who want to shop around without the legwork, IntelliMortgage delivers an efficient, transparent mortgage search experience.
uniqueFeatures: Aggregates bank, credit union, and monoline rates

meridian.name: Meridian Credit Union
meridian.tagline: Ontario's largest credit union, owned by the people it serves.
meridian.overview: Meridian Credit Union is Ontario's largest credit union, serving over 370,000 members with a full range of mortgage products and financial services. As a member-owned cooperative, Meridian returns profits to members through better mortgage rates, lower fees, and community investment. Meridian offers fixed-rate, variable-rate, and home equity line of credit mortgages with flexible terms and generous prepayment options. Their Maximum Mortgage program allows borrowers to bundle multiple products for additional rate discounts. Meridian's mortgage advisors provide personalized, local service with the financial strength of one of Canada's strongest credit unions.

vancity.name: Vancity
vancity.tagline: Values-based banking for a sustainable future.
vancity.overview: Vancity is Canada's largest community credit union, serving the Vancouver area and beyond with values-based banking and competitive mortgage products. Vancity offers fixed-rate, variable-rate, and home equity mortgages, along with unique programs like the Mixer Mortgage that combines fixed and variable portions. As a certified B Corporation, Vancity invests 30% of net profits back into community programs and environmental initiatives. Their mortgage advisors provide personalized guidance with a focus on financial well-being, not just transactions. For British Columbia homeowners who want their mortgage to align with their values, Vancity is an exceptional choice.
uniqueFeatures: Largest community credit union in Canada

desjardins.name: Desjardins
desjardins.tagline: North America's largest federation of credit unions.
desjardins.overview: Desjardins is North America's largest federation of credit unions and Quebec's dominant financial institution, serving over 7 million members. Desjardins offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including fixed-rate, variable-rate, and all-in-one mortgages through the DuoLine home equity line of credit. Their mortgage specialists provide bilingual service and deep expertise in Quebec's unique real estate market. Desjardins is known for competitive rates, flexible terms, and a strong commitment to member satisfaction. With extensive branch networks across Quebec and Ontario, Desjardins combines the personalized service of a credit union with the scale of a major financial institution.
specialties: DuoLine home equity line of credit
uniqueFeatures: Largest credit union federation in North America

coastcapital.name: Coast Capital Savings
coastcapital.tagline: Member-owned banking with simple, straightforward mortgages.
coastcapital.overview: Coast Capital Savings is Canada's largest federal credit union by membership, serving British Columbia with simple, member-focused banking and mortgage solutions. Coast Capital offers fixed-rate, variable-rate, and home equity line of credit mortgages with competitive rates and no hidden fees. Their mortgage specialists provide personalized advice with a focus on simplicity and transparency. Coast Capital is known for its community investment programs and straightforward approach to lending, making homeownership accessible for a wide range of borrowers across British Columbia.
uniqueFeatures: Largest federal credit union by membership

atb.name: ATB Financial
atb.tagline: Alberta's financial institution, built for Albertans.
atb.overview: ATB Financial is a unique Alberta-based financial institution, wholly owned by the Province of Alberta, dedicated to serving Albertans with personalized banking and mortgage solutions. ATB offers a full range of mortgage products including fixed-rate, variable-rate, and home equity lines of credit, all with competitive rates and flexible terms. Their mortgage specialists have deep knowledge of Alberta's real estate market, from Calgary and Edmonton to rural communities. ATB is known for its entrepreneurial spirit, community investment, and commitment to putting Albertans first in every financial decision.
uniqueFeatures: Wholly owned by Province of Alberta

equitable.name: Equitable Bank
equitable.tagline: Canada's Challenger Bank with big bank alternatives.
equitable.overview: Equitable Bank is Canada's seventh-largest bank by assets and the country's leading challenger bank, offering residential and commercial mortgage solutions outside the traditional banking model. Equitable provides conventional and alternative mortgages through the broker channel, including products for prime borrowers, near-prime borrowers, and those requiring specialized financing. Their EQ Bank digital platform offers some of Canada's best savings rates alongside mortgage products. Equitable is known for fast, flexible underwriting, competitive rates, and a tech-forward approach that challenges the status quo of Canadian mortgage lending.

hometrust.name: Home Trust
hometrust.tagline: Flexible mortgage solutions for Canadians who think outside the box.
hometrust.overview: Home Trust is one of Canada's leading alternative mortgage lenders, specializing in residential mortgages for borrowers who don't fit the traditional bank profile. Home Trust offers prime, near-prime, and alternative mortgage products, including first and second mortgages, with a focus on common-sense underwriting. They serve self-employed individuals, investors, newcomers to Canada, and those rebuilding credit. Home Trust's products are available exclusively through mortgage brokers, ensuring borrowers receive personalized advice alongside flexible financing solutions. With a long track record and strong capital position, Home Trust is a reliable alternative to conventional mortgage lending.
uniqueFeatures: Long track record in alternative lending

cwb.name: Canadian Western Bank (CWB)
cwb.tagline: Business banking expertise meets residential mortgage flexibility.
cwb.overview: Canadian Western Bank (CWB) is a specialized bank serving business owners and homeowners across Western Canada with tailored mortgage and banking solutions. CWB offers fixed-rate, variable-rate, and home equity line of credit mortgages, with particular expertise in financing for entrepreneurs, self-employed professionals, and agricultural operators. Their Optimum Mortgage division provides alternative mortgage solutions for borrowers with unique circumstances. CWB combines the personalized service of a regional bank with a comprehensive product suite, making them a strong choice for Western Canadians seeking flexible mortgage options.

truenorth.name: True North Mortgage
truenorth.overview: True North Mortgage is one of Canada's most popular mortgage brokerages, famous for its Lowest Rate Guarantee and volume-based discounting that delivers some of the best mortgage rates in the country. True North operates as a high-volume mortgage brokerage with both online and in-person service across Canada. They offer fixed-rate, variable-rate, and specialized mortgage products from a wide range of lenders including banks, monolines, and credit unions. True North's straightforward approach, transparent pricing, and commitment to beating competitors' rates have made them a favourite among rate-savvy Canadian homeowners.
uniqueFeatures: Access to bank, monoline, and credit union lenders
